---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Alos Diallo"
date: "2025-09-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

EWAS for No mets vs Lymph node, Lymph node vs Distant
```{r}
################################################################################
# ewas_metastasis_h6_normImmune_PAIRWISE.R
# - MODIFIED FOR PAIRWISE COMPARISONS:
#   1. No Metastasis vs. LN Only
#   2. LN Only vs. Distant
# - All other settings (HiTIMED, EpiScore, No ComBat) are unchanged.
################################################################################

## ── USER SETTINGS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
idat_v1  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
idat_v2  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

variance_percentile <- 0.90  # 0 ⇒ keep all CpGs

results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

## ── SETUP & HELPERS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi); library(sesame); library(ENmix); library(matrixStats)
  library(limma); library(HiTIMED); library(EpiDISH); library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
})

read_csv_silent <- function(file, ...) {
  if (utils::packageVersion("readr") >= "2.0.0") {
    readr::read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE, ...)
  } else {
    suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(file, ...))
  }
}

## ── 1) β-matrix (cached) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cache_dir <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache")
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
beta_rds      <- file.path(cache_dir, "beta_comb_qc.rds")
manifest_csv  <- file.path(cache_dir, "sample_manifest_v1_v2.csv")

read_pp <- function(path, tag) {
  rg  <- read.metharray.exp(path, recursive = TRUE, extended = TRUE, force = TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg, dyeMethod = "single"))
  if (tag == "v2") bet <- betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  bad <- ENmix::QCinfo(rg)$badCpG
  bet <- bet[ setdiff(rownames(bet), bad), , drop = FALSE]
  bet
}

if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  msg("Reading / normalising IDATs …")
  beta1 <- read_pp(idat_v1, "v1"); beta2 <- read_pp(idat_v2, "v2")
  sample_ids_v1 <- colnames(beta1); sample_ids_v2 <- colnames(beta2)
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta1), rownames(beta2)); stopifnot(length(common) > 0)
  beta_comb <- cbind(beta1[common, , drop = FALSE], beta2[common, , drop = FALSE])
  saveRDS(list(beta = beta_comb, sample_ids_v1 = sample_ids_v1, sample_ids_v2 = sample_ids_v2), beta_rds)
  tibble(SampleID = c(sample_ids_v1, sample_ids_v2),
         Array_Version = c(rep("v1", length(sample_ids_v1)), rep("v2", length(sample_ids_v2)))) %>%
    distinct() %>% write_csv(manifest_csv)
  msg("β-matrix cached.")
} else {
  cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(cache_obj) && !is.null(cache_obj$beta)) {
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj$beta
    sample_ids_v1 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v1
    sample_ids_v2 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v2
  } else {
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj
    sample_ids_v1 <- character(0); sample_ids_v2 <- character(0)
  }
  msg("β-matrix loaded from cache.")
}

get_annotation_for <- function(beta_mat) {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
  } else { stop("Install an Illumina methylation annotation package (EPIC or 450k).") }
  a[rownames(a) %in% rownames(beta_mat), , drop = FALSE]
}
anno <- get_annotation_for(beta_comb)
chr_vec <- NULL
if ("chr" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- anno$chr
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "CHR" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- anno$CHR
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "seqnames" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- as.character(anno$seqnames)
if (is.null(chr_vec)) stop("Could not find chromosome column in annotation.")
is_sex_chr <- chr_vec %in% c("chrX","chrY","X","Y")
sex_probes <- rownames(anno)[is_sex_chr]
n_before <- nrow(beta_comb)
if (length(sex_probes) > 0) beta_comb <- beta_comb[setdiff(rownames(beta_comb), sex_probes), , drop = FALSE]
msg(length(sex_probes), " chrX/chrY probes removed; ", n_before, " → ", nrow(beta_comb), " CpGs remain.")

M.mat <- log2(beta_comb / pmax(1 - beta_comb, 1e-6) + 1e-6)
if (variance_percentile > 0) {
  v <- rowVars(M.mat, na.rm = TRUE); var_thr <- quantile(v, variance_percentile, na.rm = TRUE)
  keep <- v > var_thr; beta_comb <- beta_comb[keep, , drop = FALSE]; M.mat <- M.mat[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  msg(sum(keep), " CpGs kept (top ", 100 * (1 - variance_percentile), "% var).")
}

## ── 2a) EpiScore & 2b) HiTIMED ──────────────────────────────────────────────
data(centEpiFibIC.m)
run_episcore <- function(beta) {
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
  est <- epidish(beta[common, ], centEpiFibIC.m[common, ], method = "RPC")$estF; as.data.frame(est) * 100
}
msg("Running EpiScore (RPC) for fibroblast …")
fib_scores <- run_episcore(beta_comb) %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")
msg("Running HiTIMED  h = 6 …")
frac_h6 <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", h = 6) %>% as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>% left_join(fib_scores, by = "SampleID")

## ── 3) & 4) Collapse Fractions & Tier Templates ───────────────────────────
collapse_frac <- function(df) {
  get_ <- function(x) if (x %in% names(df)) df[[x]] else 0
  imm_cols <- c("CD8mem","CD8nv","CD4mem","CD4nv","Treg","Bmem","Bnv","DC","Mono","NK")
  totalImm <- rowSums(df[imm_cols], na.rm = TRUE); totalImm[totalImm == 0] <- NA
  tibble(SampleID = df$SampleID, Tumor = get_("Tumor"), Fibroblast = get_("Fib"),
         StromalOther = get_("Endothelial") + get_("Epithelial"),
         CD8_T = (get_("CD8mem") + get_("CD8nv")) / totalImm,
         LymphOther = (get_("CD4mem") + get_("CD4nv") + get_("Treg") + get_("Bmem") + get_("Bnv")) / totalImm
  ) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), as.numeric))
}
tier_template <- list(
  Tier1 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num"), Tier2 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor"),
  Tier3 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor","Fibroblast","StromalOther","CD8_T","LymphOther")
)
trim_tiers <- function(tiers, avail) lapply(tiers, intersect, avail)

################################################################################
##  5) Loop over PAIRWISE comparisons (NO ComBat)
################################################################################

## <<< CHANGE: Define the specific pairwise comparisons to run
comparisons <- list(
  No_vs_LN   = c("No Metastasis", "LN Only"),
  LN_vs_Dist = c("LN Only", "Distant")
)

for (comp_tag in names(comparisons)) {
  msg("\n===== COMPARISON: ", comp_tag, " =====")

  group_names <- comparisons[[comp_tag]]

  # Load and prepare full metadata
  meta <- read_csv_silent(meta_csv) %>%
    mutate(
      SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
      # Define a clear metastasis status column
      Metastasis_Status = case_when(
        Distant_Mets == 1 ~ "Distant",
        ln_only == 1      ~ "LN Only",
        TRUE              ~ "No Metastasis"
      ),
      sex_num  = as.integer(sex == "M"),
      MLH1_num = as.integer(MLH1 == 1)
    )

  # Subset metadata to only the two groups in the current comparison
  meta_subset <- meta %>%
    filter(Metastasis_Status %in% group_names) %>%
    # Create the binary phenotype variable for the comparison
    # Group 1 (e.g., "No Metastasis") is the reference (0)
    # Group 2 (e.g., "LN Only") is the target (1)
    mutate(
      pheno_bin = as.integer(factor(Metastasis_Status, levels = group_names)) - 1
    )

  stopifnot(all(meta_subset$pheno_bin %in% 0:1, na.rm = TRUE))

  # Join with cell fraction data and filter for complete cases
  frac_df  <- collapse_frac(frac_h6)
  meta_all <- left_join(meta_subset, frac_df, by = "SampleID")
  ok       <- complete.cases(meta_all[, tier_template$Tier3])
  meta_f   <- meta_all[ok, , drop = FALSE]

  # Check if we have samples left from both groups
  if (length(unique(meta_f$pheno_bin)) < 2) {
    msg("SKIPPING: Not enough samples in both groups for comparison '", comp_tag, "'.")
    next
  }
  msg("Running EWAS for '", comp_tag, "' with ", nrow(meta_f), " samples.")

  # Subset the methylation matrix to match the filtered metadata
  M_f <- M.mat[, meta_f$SampleID, drop = FALSE]

  ## NO ComBat: same-cohort v1/v2 + intersected probes is sufficient
  M_cb <- M_f

  tier_list <- trim_tiers(tier_template, names(meta_f))
  fits <- purrr::map(tier_list, function(covs) {
    is_var <- vapply(
      meta_f[covs],
      function(x) is.numeric(x) && is.finite(stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)) && stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
      logical(1)
    )
    nz <- covs[is_var]
    form <- if (length(nz) == 0) {
      ~ pheno_bin
    } else {
      as.formula(paste("~ pheno_bin +", paste(nz, collapse = " + ")))
    }
    des <- model.matrix(form, data = meta_f)
    eBayes(lmFit(M_cb, des), trend = TRUE, robust = TRUE)
  })

  ## Write results under a new directory structure
  out_dir <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{comp_tag}"), "H6")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  saveRDS(fits, file.path(out_dir, "ewas_fits.rds"))
  msg("✓  fits saved → ", out_dir)
}

msg("\n✅ Finished: Pairwise comparisons (HiTIMED-h6, immune-normalised + EpiScore; NO ComBat)")
```

Generate results list
```{r}
###############################################################################
# summarize_top_cpgs_PAIRWISE.R
# - MODIFIED to read results from pairwise EWAS runs.
# - Generates Top 100 lists and comprehensive tables with ALL CpGs and betas.
###############################################################################

## --------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------- ##
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
meta_csv_path <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

h_level <- "H6"
tier    <- "Tier3"
top_n   <- 100

## <<< CHANGE: Define the new comparison tags to look for
comparisons_to_summarize <- c("No_vs_LN", "LN_vs_Dist")

output_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_summary_pairwise")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## --------------- SETUP ---------------------------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma); library(dplyr); library(glue)
  library(readr); library(tibble)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

get_epic_annotation <- function() {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
    getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else {
    warning("EPIC annotation package not available; 'Gene' column will be NA.")
    NULL
  }
}

###############################################################################
##  1. LOAD BETA MATRIX AND METADATA
###############################################################################
msg("Loading main beta matrix and metadata...")

beta_rds <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  stop("Beta matrix cache file not found at: ", beta_rds)
}
beta_comb <- readRDS(beta_rds)$beta

meta <- read_csv(meta_csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    Metastasis_Status = factor(case_when(
        Distant_Mets == 1 ~ "Distant",
        ln_only == 1      ~ "LN Only",
        TRUE              ~ "No Metastasis"
      ), levels = c("No Metastasis", "LN Only", "Distant"))
  ) %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_comb)) %>%
  arrange(Metastasis_Status)

beta_comb_ordered <- beta_comb[, meta$SampleID]

###############################################################################
##  2. LOAD ALL PAIRWISE EWAS RESULTS
###############################################################################
msg("Loading all EWAS results from pairwise comparisons...")

all_results <- list()

for (comp_tag in comparisons_to_summarize) {
  fit_file <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{comp_tag}"), h_level, "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) {
    warning(glue("Could not find fits file for comparison '{comp_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }
  fits <- readRDS(fit_file)
  if (!tier %in% names(fits)) {
    warning(glue("Tier '{tier}' not found for comparison '{comp_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }
  fit_obj <- fits[[tier]]; if (!inherits(fit_obj, "MArrayLM")) fit_obj <- fit_obj$fit
  tt <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf, p.value = 1, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")
  all_results[[comp_tag]] <- tt
}
if (length(all_results) == 0) {
  stop("No EWAS results found.")
}

###############################################################################
##  3. LOAD/BUILD ANNOTATION MAP
###############################################################################
anno <- get_epic_annotation()
probe2gene <- NULL
if (!is.null(anno)) {
  gn <- as.character(anno$UCSC_RefGene_Name)
  gn <- sub(";.*$", "", gn)
  names(gn) <- as.character(anno$Name)
  probe2gene <- gn
}

###############################################################################
##  4. MAIN LOOP TO GENERATE TABLES FOR EACH PAIRWISE COMPARISON
###############################################################################
for (primary_comparison in names(all_results)) {

  msg(glue::glue("--- Generating tables for '{primary_comparison}' ---"))
  primary_results <- all_results[[primary_comparison]]

  # --- A. Generate and save the full data file with beta values ---
  common_cpgs <- intersect(primary_results$CpG_ID, rownames(beta_comb_ordered))
  stats_part <- primary_results %>% filter(CpG_ID %in% common_cpgs)
  gene_part  <- tibble(CpG_ID = common_cpgs, Gene = unname(probe2gene[common_cpgs]))
  beta_part  <- as.data.frame(beta_comb_ordered[common_cpgs, ]) %>% rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")
  
  full_data_table <- stats_part %>%
    left_join(gene_part, by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    left_join(beta_part, by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    select(CpG_ID, Gene, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val, everything())
    
  out_full <- file.path(output_dir, glue::glue("Full_EWAS_Results_with_Betas_{primary_comparison}.csv"))
  readr::write_csv(full_data_table, out_full)
  msg(glue::glue("✓ Saved full data: {basename(out_full)}"))

  # --- B. Generate and save the Top N summary tables ---
  top_hyper_ids <- primary_results %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC > 0) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = top_n) %>% pull(CpG_ID)
  summary_table_hyper <- primary_results %>%
    filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hyper_ids) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val)

  top_hypo_ids <- primary_results %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC < 0) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = top_n) %>% pull(CpG_ID)
  summary_table_hypo <- primary_results %>%
    filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hypo_ids) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val)

  if (!is.null(probe2gene)) {
    summary_table_hyper <- summary_table_hyper %>% mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
    summary_table_hypo  <- summary_table_hypo  %>% mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
  }
  
  out_hyper <- file.path(output_dir, glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_comparison}_hyper.csv"))
  out_hypo  <- file.path(output_dir, glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_comparison}_hypo.csv"))
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hyper, out_hyper)
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hypo,  out_hypo)
  msg(glue("✓ Saved Top {top_n} summary: {basename(out_hyper)}"))
  msg(glue("✓ Saved Top {top_n} summary: {basename(out_hypo)}"))
}

msg("\n✅ All pairwise summary tables created successfully.")
```
```{r}
################################################################################
# final_heatmap_pairwise_script.R
#
# - Creates two separate heatmaps for pairwise comparisons:
#   1. No Metastasis vs. LN Only
#   2. LN Only vs. Distant
# - Temporarily removes functional group annotations for a simplified view.
# - Assumes 'beta_comb' and metadata are available.
################################################################################

## ---------------- 1. SETUP & LIBRARIES ----------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(pheatmap); library(dplyr); library(readr); library(RColorBrewer)
  library(grid); library(Cairo)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

## ---------------- 2. USER SETTINGS & FILE PATHS -------------------------- ##

# Point this to the output directory from the new summary script
summary_dir <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/results_summary_pairwise/"

# Path to the full metadata file
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

# Where to save the final heatmap figures
output_dir  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/results_publication_figure_pairwise/"
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Assumes 'beta_comb' is already loaded in your R environment.
# If not, load it from your cache:
if (!exists("beta_comb")) {
  beta_rds <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/ewas_cache/beta_comb_qc.rds"
  if (file.exists(beta_rds)) {
    msg("Loading beta matrix from cache...")
    beta_comb <- readRDS(beta_rds)$beta
  } else {
    stop("Please load the 'beta_comb' matrix into your R environment.")
  }
}

################################################################################
##  3. MAIN HEATMAP GENERATION FUNCTION
################################################################################

generate_pairwise_heatmap <- function(comparison_tag, groups_to_plot) {

  msg(glue::glue("--- Generating heatmap for comparison: {comparison_tag} ---"))

  ## --- A. Load the Top CpG lists for this comparison ---
  top_hyper_file <- file.path(summary_dir, glue::glue("Top100_DMPs_Summary_from_{comparison_tag}_hyper.csv"))
  top_hypo_file  <- file.path(summary_dir, glue::glue("Top100_DMPs_Summary_from_{comparison_tag}_hypo.csv"))

  if (!file.exists(top_hyper_file) || !file.exists(top_hypo_file)) {
    warning(glue::glue("SKIPPING: CpG list files not found for {comparison_tag}."))
    return(NULL)
  }

  top_hyper_cpgs <- read_csv(top_hyper_file, show_col_types = FALSE)$CpG_ID
  top_hypo_cpgs  <- read_csv(top_hypo_file, show_col_types = FALSE)$CpG_ID
  final_cpgs_to_plot <- c(top_hyper_cpgs, top_hypo_cpgs)
  gap_row_position <- length(top_hyper_cpgs)


  ## --- B. Prepare Annotations, filtering for only the groups of interest ---
  meta_for_heatmap <- read_csv(meta_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
      Metastasis_Status = case_when(
        Distant_Mets == 1 ~ "Distant",
        ln_only == 1      ~ "LN Only",
        TRUE              ~ "No Metastasis"
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(
      SampleID %in% colnames(beta_comb),
      Metastasis_Status %in% groups_to_plot ## <<< Filters to the two groups
    ) %>%
    mutate(Metastasis_Status = factor(Metastasis_Status, levels = groups_to_plot)) %>%
    arrange(Metastasis_Status)

  annotation_col <- meta_for_heatmap %>%
    select(Metastasis_Status) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  rownames(annotation_col) <- meta_for_heatmap$SampleID

  annotation_colors <- list(
    Metastasis_Status = c("No Metastasis" = "#4575b4", "LN Only" = "#fdae61", "Distant" = "#d73027")
  )

  ## --- C. Prepare the data matrix ---
  mat_ordered <- beta_comb[final_cpgs_to_plot, meta_for_heatmap$SampleID]
  gap_col_positions <- which(diff(as.numeric(meta_for_heatmap$Metastasis_Status)) != 0)


  ## --- D. Define color palette ---
  plot_colors <- colorRampPalette(rev(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = 7, name = "RdYlBu")))(100)
  plot_breaks <- seq(-2.5, 2.5, length.out = 101)


  ## --- E. Generate and save the heatmap using cairo_pdf ---
  heatmap_filename <- file.path(output_dir, glue::glue("Heatmap_Body_{comparison_tag}.pdf"))
  cairo_pdf(heatmap_filename, width = 8, height = 11)

  pheatmap(
    mat_ordered,
    annotation_col = annotation_col,
    annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
    main = comparison_tag,
    show_colnames = TRUE,
    show_rownames = FALSE, ## <<< Hiding row names for a cleaner first look
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    scale = "row",
    gaps_row = gap_row_position,
    gaps_col = gap_col_positions,
    legend = TRUE,
    annotation_legend = TRUE,
    border_color = NA,
    color = plot_colors,
    breaks = plot_breaks
  )
  dev.off()
  msg(paste("✓ Heatmap saved to:", heatmap_filename))
}

################################################################################
##  4. EXECUTE FOR BOTH COMPARISONS
################################################################################

# Generate the first heatmap: No Metastasis vs. LN Only
generate_pairwise_heatmap(
  comparison_tag = "No_vs_LN",
  groups_to_plot = c("No Metastasis", "LN Only")
)

# Generate the second heatmap: LN Only vs. Distant
generate_pairwise_heatmap(
  comparison_tag = "LN_vs_Dist",
  groups_to_plot = c("LN Only", "Distant")
)

msg("\n✅ All heatmaps generated successfully.")
```
